title: Human Nature — Kinki × L'Oréal
role: Visual content & projection mapping (with Cris Molle)
excerpt: “Human Nature” — a Kinki Kappers show for L'Oréal Pro: 3D-scanned models, four chapters, and projection-mapped digital worlds.
description:
Human Nature is a show created by Kinki Kappers for L'Oréal Pro, telling a story about the relationship between our human nature and the Metaverse — the light and darkness in us all as we build the digital world.
The show is built on 3D scans of the catwalk models, processed in TouchDesigner into four chapters, each with its own digital scenery and timecode-automated light. I created the visual content and projection mapping together with Cris Molle (LiGHT-UP Collective), wrapping the runway and stage in shifting digital landscapes for models, dancers and aerial performers.
credits: A Kinki Kappers show for L'Oréal Pro — “Human Nature”. Art direction: Casper. Projection mapping & content: Jaco Schilp & Cris Molle (LiGHT-UP Collective). Choreography: Virgil Moreno & Meyline. Music: The Shirley Temple. Photography: Fabrice Debatty.
